# Cofhe SDK Docs

> Documentation for the Cofhe SDK

## Docs

- [Intro](/docs): `@cofhe/sdk` is the core library for integrating with Fhenix’s CoFHE coprocessor.
- [Example](/example): This is an example page.
- [Get started](/getting-started): Hello world!
- [Client](/docs/client): This page covers the core SDK lifecycle:
- [Migrating from ](/docs/migrating-from-cofhejs): `cofhesdk` is an improved replacement for `cofhejs`. Improvements are focused around:
